today_in_history_posts.title: RFC for BIP: Derivation scheme for P2WPKH-nested-in-P2SH based accounts
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Daniel Weigl proposed a BIP44-compliant wallet improvement.
- His proposal is accessible on GitHub for community feedback.
- He requested a proposal number, barring any objections.

today_in_history_posts.title: [BOLT RFC#1] Encryption spec
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- A developer is implementing an encryption layer for Amiko Pay, raising several questions.
- Concerns include public key usage, message randomness, and protection against timing analysis.
- Queries also address message authentication, MITM attack vulnerabilities, and the ack field's role.

today_in_history_posts.title: Bitcoin and Quantum Computing
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The report examines quantum computing's threat to Bitcoin's security.
- It offers strategies for Bitcoin to enhance quantum resistance.
- Stakeholders are encouraged to engage and plan for future security.
